topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: All analytics charts and current Grafana dashboards (1–5, platform health) reachable inside the financegnome web UI at financegnome.omniflow.cc; no separate Grafana tab required for normal use; new charts added in the same shell going forward.

React AppLayout/navigation and new Analytics section; frontend embed or API chart layer; optional backend proxy for Grafana auth; grafana/provisioning dashboards remain data source until migrated; remove external-only Wealth link pattern.

OIDC session must cover embedded views; Traefik auth middleware on omniflow; CSP/frame-ancestors; duplicate ECharts vs Grafana SQL paths (US-0002–US-0009); DEC-0012 dashboard UIDs; US-0010 external profile may keep Grafana internal—embed needs same-origin or trusted proxy URL.
UAT: open each dashboard from financegnome sidebar without leaving host; smoke with AUTH; document chart-add pattern for future features; regression on existing Forecast/Wealth ECharts pages.
Operator uses one URL for product analytics; acceptance lists every dashboard route; future-chart guideline in user guide; optional Grafana public host no longer required for default UX.
